MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to all Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/Case removed from Early Settlement Program. Proceedings reported by: Arlene Howell, CSR# 2542. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Set For Trial On Apr-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-18-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 501

Notice Ofm Otion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MULTICORP, INC.'S Motion For Change Of Venue (to Contra Costa County).
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - denied. Pursuant to CCP Section 395(b), the dispute arises out of contracts with plaintiffs in San Francisco where the transaction was consummated. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2008 Continued To Oct-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kenneth Atterman (482.8300) specially appearing for plaintiffs and opposing party
Katrin Cusak (925.838.8805) for defendant and moving party

This matter was argued with regard to service of opposition. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT PAUL VOSE'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is denied. No admissible evidence has been presented to support the motion. Mission Imports v. Superior Court (1982) 31 C. 3d 921, 929; Cal. Rule of Court section 3.1113(b). Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
